Ad Example with the FAQ Bridge Strategy
Landing Page:
Hypothetical Dog Supplement Offer
Value Prop of Offer:
Support your dog’s joints so they extend their healthspan, have better mobility,
continue to act like a young puppy with more energy, and you feel better about
yourself as a pet owner.
Core Demographic:
Dog owners who care deeply about the health and wellbeing of their dogs. Often
with older dogs who are starting to slow down.
Market’s Core Desire:
To keep your dog acting young, spry, and happy forever.
Competitors (Ads Library):

What Market Is Asking? (Answer the Public)

What Does It Mean If Your Dog’s Poop is Green?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 7 --

Should you worry if your dog’s poop often comes out green?
It depends.
While there’s nothing wrong with the occasional green poop…
In some cases, it could be a sign that something more serious is going on inside
your dog.
Star Vet Dr. So-and-So Reveals the answer for the fist time ever.
Go see his full breakdown of what the color of your dog’s poop says about their
health.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
